since_last: 44% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.60% · Gold -0.95% · Nasdaq100 -3.02%. 44% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.20%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.20%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -12.58%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.65%, NOW +4.15%, NET +4.13%, SPCX +3.74%, CHKP +3.21%. Laggards: MU -12.58%, VRT -10.24%, LRCX -9.30%, KLAC -9.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.74% at $160.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
